observations.detail: Search input opened GlobalSearch with 5 navItems results.
Search close button cleared query and hid popover.
GlobalSearch result routed to view=vault and cleared query.
Read-all and settings footer buttons were clickable but produced no route/state effect beyond existing drawer.
Help button click caused no URL change, matching missing handler trace.
Theme and locale controls toggled document-level state.
Matter sidebar group toggles opened through aria-expanded state.
